title: AI Space Explorer
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a cinematic space exploration scene.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a cinematic space exploration scene. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial features, expression, pose, camera angle, and main composition. Reimagine the subject as an elite astronaut or intergalactic explorer in a detailed futuristic suit, standing on an alien planet with stars, galaxies, and colorful nebulae in the sky. Use dramatic science-fiction lighting, realistic materials, sharp focus, and premium movie-production realism. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, changed identity, distorted face, deformed body, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text, low detail, broken helmet, poor lighting, noise, pixelated, horror elements, unrealistic proportions, cropped subject, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, extra people, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, signature, interface elements
